evidence: MAPK1 phosphorylates Elk-1 at Ser383 in response to EGF.
note: direct symbol match

evidence: ERK was phosphorylated within 10 minutes of EGF stimulation.
note: alias (ERK) → MAPK1

evidence: Insulin stimulation activated AKT1 through PI3K-dependent phosphorylation.
note: family member AKT1 → family AKT

evidence: MDM2 overexpression promoted cell cycle progression in glioma cells.
note: TP53 not referenced at all

evidence: Aβ oligomers induced synaptic dysfunction in hippocampal neurons.
note: Aβ is an APP fragment

evidence: PTENP1 expression was elevated in breast cancer and correlated with PTEN mRNA stability.
note: pseudogene with distinct symbol — must accept

evidence: HMGB1 protein was upregulated in response to oxidative stress.
note: parent-symbol collision on pseudogene → reject

evidence: AR was shown to inhibit amphiregulin secretion in mammary epithelium.
note: AR = androgen receptor in HGNC; evidence ambiguous (AR might be amphiregulin abbreviation)

evidence: MAPK signaling was attenuated by 30 minutes of serum starvation.
note: family-level mention of MAPK collectively

evidence: Inhibition of miR-21 restored PTEN expression in hepatocellular carcinoma cells.
note: alias miR-21 → MIR21

evidence: RAF kinase inhibitors showed synergy with MEK inhibitors in KRAS-mutant tumors.
note: RAF is a family including BRAF; ambiguous reference

evidence: STAT3 was not detectable in the immunoprecipitate even after 60 minutes of IL-6 treatment.
note: STAT3 is named even though its presence is negated — the entity IS mentioned

evidence: The p97/VCP ATPase regulates protein quality control in the endoplasmic reticulum.
note: p97/VCP and GEMIN4 are unrelated genes; cross-symbol grounding collision must reject (mirrors v5 dual-run #9)

evidence: Histone deacetylase HDAC3 was found to deacetylate p53 in nuclear extracts of HEK293 cells.
note: Evidence mentions histone deacetylase enzyme (HDAC3), not a histone protein. Generic family name in claim should not match (mirrors v5 dual-run #18)

evidence: PPM1B serves as the dedicated TBK1 phosphatase that dephosphorylates TBK1 in vivo.
note: PPM1B is the specific phosphatase; 'Phosphatase' as a claim entity is a generic functional term, not a gene

evidence: Vinculin localizes to FAs in an inactive conformation upon serum deprivation.
note: FAs in evidence is 'focal adhesions', not FAS death receptor. Case-sensitive abbreviation collision must reject (mirrors v5 dual-run #13)

evidence: PD-1 signaling inhibits IFN-gamma production in tumor-infiltrating T lymphocytes.
note: PD-1 is PDCD1, not NELFCD. Cross-gene grounding collision (mirrors v5 dual-run #22)

evidence: MAPK1 phosphorylates Elk-1 at Ser383 in response to growth-factor stimulation.
note: MAPK1 is the specific kinase; 'Kinase' as a claim entity is a generic functional term

evidence: Treatment with HDAC inhibitors elevated AR acetylation in LNCaP cells within 4 hours.
note: HDAC family is directly named via the inhibitor class. Positive control: legitimate family-level mention should NOT be over-rejected

evidence: Histone deacetylases were broadly inhibited by trichostatin A treatment in lymphoma cell lines.
note: Evidence uses the long-form family name 'histone deacetylases'; legitimate family mention via alias

evidence: p38 MAPK was activated 30 minutes after TNF stimulation in HeLa cells.
note: p38 is a well-known alias for MAPK14; positive control to ensure new prompt doesn't over-correct on legitimate aliases
